name: @gethinode/template
description: Hinode is a production-ready Hugo theme built on Bootstrap 5. Open source, actively maintained, and built for developers.

scripts.start:prod: npm run -s prestart  && hugo server --bind=0.0.0.0 --disableFastRender --printI18nWarnings -e production
scripts.prebuild: npm run clean:public && npm run -s mod:vendor
scripts.build:cache: npm run -s prebuild && hugo config | grep cachedir && hugo --gc --minify -e ci
scripts.build:headers: npm run build:headers:dev && npm run build:headers:prod
scripts.build:headers:dev: hugo --renderSegments headers -d prebuild-headers-dev -e development && cpy prebuild-headers-dev/server.toml config/_default/ --flat
scripts.build:headers:prod: hugo --renderSegments headers -d prebuild-headers-prod -e production && cpy prebuild-headers-prod/netlify.toml ./ --flat
scripts.mod:update: rimraf _vendor && hugo mod get -u ./... && hugo mod get -u && npm run -s mod:vendor && npm run -s mod:tidy
